headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Alliant Energy, Raises Price Target to $74
summary: Mizuho  analyst Anthony Crowdell   maintains Alliant Energy (NASDAQ:LNT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $73 to $74.
